name: Morarjee Textiles Limited
summary: Morarjee Textiles Limited manufactures and sells yarns and fabrics in India and internationally. The company primarily offers premium cotton shirting fabrics. It also provides printed fabrics, including satin, cambric, poplin, lawn, and silk; and yarn dyed shirting, voiles, and white fabrics. The company was founded in 1871 and is based in Mumbai, India. Morarjee Textiles Limited is a subsidiary of Ashok Piramal Group Textiles Trust.
